title: funky flaky german dish bun
description:
romantic german dish featuring asian-chive-buchu, double-fry-kfc, shojin-friendly
flaky, crispy, and moist, these buns are perfect for a dinner date

ingredients.name: asiatic chives
ingredients.notes: freshly chopped, from a local farm

instructions: in a small bowl, combine flour, butter, and a pinch of salt. mix until the dough comes together in a ball.
knead the dough for 10 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 180c.
divide the dough into 4 equal pieces, roll each piece into a ball, and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
fry the buns in batches until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
drain the buns on paper towels, then place them on a wire rack to cool slightly.
split the buns open, fill them with double-fried chicken nuggets, and garnish with shojin-style sesame seeds.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
